# QueueFusion

> QueueFusion is a queue management and customer flow platform for US hospitals, health systems, banks, credit unions, city & county government, DMV offices and federal agencies — covering online appointments, digital ticketing, reception check-in, live displays and customer feedback.

QueueFusion helps US organizations cut wait times, manage visitor flow across multiple sites, and report on service performance from a single cloud dashboard. HIPAA-ready, CCPA compliant, hosted in the US.

## Pages

- [Home](/): QueueFusion overview, features, industries served, partner program and demo booking.

## Visitor Journey (Industries)

- [Healthcare & Hospitals](/visitor-journey/healthcare): Queue management and patient flow for US hospitals, health systems, clinics and urgent care.
- [Retail](/visitor-journey/retail): Customer flow and service desk queuing for US retail.
- [Public Sector & Government](/visitor-journey/public-sector): Visitor management for US city & county government, DMV and federal agencies.
- [Finance & Banking](/visitor-journey/finance): Branch queuing and appointment booking for US banks and credit unions.
- [Corporate](/visitor-journey/corporate): Reception and visitor management for corporate offices.

## Visitor Services (Product Modules)

- [Queue Management](/visitor-services/queue-management): Virtual and physical queue management with live displays.
- [Customer Counting](/visitor-services/customer-counting): People counting and footfall analytics.
- [Satisfaction Survey](/visitor-services/satisfaction-survey): Real-time customer feedback collection.
- [Corporate Reception](/visitor-services/corporate-reception): Visitor check-in and reception management.
- [Online Appointments](/visitor-services/online-appointments): Self-service appointment booking.

## Optional

- [Partner Program](/#resellers): Become a QueueFusion reseller — for digital signage, AV/IT integrators and visitor-management firms.
- [Book a Demo](/#demo): Request a 20-minute tailored demo.
